upstreams.role: DTG credential creation and verification implementation
OpenVTC relationship, VRC, DID, and runtime workflow implementation
VTI/VTA authority, sealed transfer, DID template, attestation, and integration implementation

mappings.authority_surface: Issuer DID, VC type array, validity window, proof suite, and credentialSubject binding
mappings.assurance_implication: Establishes minimum interoperable shape before applying stronger TIS semantic overlays.

mappings.authority_surface: Persona DID, relationship counterparty, mediator, VRC issuer, and storage state
mappings.assurance_implication: Makes OpenVTC workflow state replayable as evidence for decision receipts and relying-party evaluation.

mappings.authority_surface: VTA context, ACL entry, authorization credential, sealed transfer, DID template, and attestation reference
mappings.assurance_implication: Captures authority, delegation, scope, enforcement, revocation, and audit evidence for runtime trust operations.

drift_review.cadence: Review upstream release notes and schema-relevant implementation changes before each TIS minor release and at least monthly while profiles remain experimental.
signals: VTA ACL or context model changes
breaking changes in CLI output or examples
drift_review.required_action: Open a TIS drift review issue when upstream changes alter artifact shape, authority semantics, evidence requirements, or validation fixtures.
